topic: Deep review of source-level changes shipped 2026-05-14

focus: D1: Correctness — throw vs null contract + caller audit

findingDetails.title: Reconsolidation-bridge:643 passthrough lacks explicit try/catch
findingDetails.evidence: generateDocumentEmbedding now throws; the callback is not wrapped in try/catch
findingDetails.recommendation: Add explicit try/catch around the generateEmbedding callback in reconsolidation-bridge
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct caller audit of throw contract change

findingDetails.title: Stage1 top-level catch swallows error context
findingDetails.evidence: executeStage1 catches any throw and returns empty candidates with only console.warn
findingDetails.recommendation: Propagate error type to metadata for downstream observability

findingDetails.title: Batch-vs-single behavioral asymmetry undocumented
findingDetails.evidence: generateBatchEmbeddings returns null[] on error while individual functions throw
findingDetails.recommendation: Add JSDoc documenting the contract difference

findingDetails.title: batchErrorCount only logged when verbose=true
findingDetails.evidence: Error count is accumulated but only reported with verbose flag
findingDetails.recommendation: Consider logging batchErrorCount unconditionally at warn level

focus: D1: Correctness — tokenizer API correctness + BOS/EOS overhead

findingDetails.title: Tokenizer API placed behind type guard but not runtime version guard
findingDetails.evidence: typeof check for tokenize/detokenize; no runtime version check for node-llama-cpp
findingDetails.recommendation: Add JSDoc documenting node-llama-cpp v3.17.1 minimum version requirement

findingDetails.title: Token budget doesn't account for embedding prefix overhead
findingDetails.evidence: 10% headroom covers BOS/EOS but not getPrefixFor tokens added after tokenization
findingDetails.recommendation: Consider adding prefix token estimation to budget calculation

findingDetails.title: Empty-string after truncation not explicitly guarded
findingDetails.evidence: If tokenBudget ≤ 0, detokenize could produce empty string
findingDetails.recommendation: Add guard: if detokenized result is empty, fall back to original input or throw

focus: D1: Correctness — circuit breaker accounting under throw contract

findingDetails.title: Circuit breaker threshold of 3 may be aggressive under throw contract
findingDetails.evidence: EMBEDDING_CB_THRESHOLD defaults to 3; under throw contract the failure counter increments before throw propagates
findingDetails.recommendation: Document throw contract interaction in circuit breaker comments; consider threshold adjustment
findingDetails.scopeProof: Circuit breaker + throw contract interaction analysis

findingDetails.title: resetForTesting() could reset production state if misused
findingDetails.evidence: Test utilities exported on __embeddingCircuitTestables
findingDetails.recommendation: Low risk; naming convention makes accidental misuse unlikely

focus: D2: Security — injection and exposure vectors

findingDetails.title: Thrown error messages propagate to logs without sanitization
findingDetails.evidence: console.warn logs provider error messages which could contain internal details
findingDetails.recommendation: Consider sanitizing error messages in production logs

findingDetails.title: detokenize on truncated tokens cannot produce injection
findingDetails.evidence: detokenize operates on token subset of original input; no injection surface
findingDetails.recommendation: No action needed; verified as safe

focus: D3: Traceability — test coverage gaps and spec-code alignment

findingDetails.title: Circuit breaker open-then-null path untested under throw contract
findingDetails.evidence: T029 tests cover throw propagation but not circuit breaker state transition under throws
findingDetails.recommendation: Add integration test: 3 consecutive throws -> circuit opens -> next call returns null
findingDetails.scopeProof: Test coverage audit for Bug A

findingDetails.title: Token budget tests use charTokenize mock, not real tokenizer
findingDetails.evidence: Mock tokenizer overestimates token count; T030-04 smoke test is conditional
findingDetails.recommendation: Add property-based test with realistic tokenizer when model available

findingDetails.title: Skill-advisor dist relies on shared emit path through code-graph
findingDetails.evidence: Include directive emits system-spec-kit/shared into code-graph dist; skill-advisor has its own compilation
findingDetails.recommendation: Verify skill-advisor compiles shared independently; document the emit dependency
findingDetails.scopeProof: Cross-skill emit shape audit for tsconfig change

findingDetails.title: No integration test for tsconfig emit shape change
findingDetails.evidence: Project references removed without CI verification of output structure
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a build verification test comparing emit output before/after tsconfig changes

focus: D3: Traceability — operational safety of 040 reset + documentation drift

findingDetails.title: pending vs retry status — failure_reason not cleared by SQL reset
findingDetails.evidence: SQL UPDATE set status=pending but left old failure_reason text
findingDetails.recommendation: Next retry attempt will overwrite failure_reason; no functional issue but documentation gap

findingDetails.title: Pre-renumber path references may remain in older docs
findingDetails.evidence: 028/029/030 renumbered to 008/038/039 but stale references may exist
findingDetails.recommendation: Search cross-references and update any remaining old paths

focus: D4: Maintainability — patterns, naming, dead code

findingDetails.title: Inconsistent error message prefixes across throw contract
findingDetails.evidence: generateEmbedding vs generateDocumentEmbedding vs generateQueryEmbedding use different prefix strings
findingDetails.recommendation: Standardize to [embeddings:FN_NAME] prefix pattern

findingDetails.title: Test singletons persist across test suites without forcing reset
findingDetails.evidence: testRuntimeOverride and testNodeLlamaCppModule are module-level singletons
findingDetails.recommendation: Low risk; afterEach cleanup exists in token-budget tests

findingDetails.title: Log level inconsistency: batch uses error vs per-item uses warn
findingDetails.evidence: console.error for batch vs console.warn for per-item error logging
findingDetails.recommendation: Standardize to same log level or document the distinction
findingDetails.scopeProof: Log level audit across error paths

focus: D4: Maintainability — Metal acceleration regression risk

findingDetails.title: trainContextSize fallback value 2048 is undocumented magic number
findingDetails.evidence: const trainContextSize = model.trainContextSize ?? 2048; fallback not documented
findingDetails.recommendation: Extract to a named constant with JSDoc explaining the fallback rationale
